title: Running Pods on Only Some Nodes — Step 2: Create the manifest
text:
Let's create a
DaemonSet
which will provision the daemon pods on the SSD labeled
nodes
only.
Next, use a
nodeSelector
to ensure that the DaemonSet only runs Pods on nodes
with the
ssd
label set to
"true"
.
apiVersion
:
apps/v1
kind
:
DaemonSet
metadata
:
name
:
ssd-driver
labels
:
app
:
nginx
spec
:
selector
:
matchLabels
:
app
:
ssd-driver-pod
template
:
metadata
:
labels
:
app
:
ssd-driver-pod
spec
:
nodeSelector
:
ssd
:
"true"
containers
:
-
name
:
example-container
image
:
example-image
